name: Habba Khatoon Peak
description: A magnificent, pyramid-shaped mountain peak that dramatically dominates the Gurez Valley landscape, standing majestically above the Kishanganga River.
history: Named after the legendary 16th-century Kashmiri poetess Habba Khatoon, who supposedly wandered near this peak grieving for her imprisoned husband, King Yousuf Shah Chak.
famousFor: Dramatic pyramid shape, scenic sunsets, local folklore.
